title: Dell India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dell India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
